reasoning: 3-(9-anthryl)acrylaldehyde is a cinnamaldehyde analogue where the phenyl group is replaced by a 9-anthracenyl group; it is an alpha,beta-unsaturated aldehyde (acrylaldehyde) attached to an aryl group, fitting the cinnamaldehyde structural motif. Cinnamaldehydes belong to the phenylpropanoids and polyketides superclass.
